scope: M5 Batch 025 draft. Adds port-services and clearance communications: inward/outward clearance, customs and immigration, pilot boarding station/time, and services after clearance. Draft only: no starter merge and no production deploy.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Crew list must not become passenger, cargo, or watch list.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Free pratique is a health/port formality, not traffic, passage, or port clearance
qa_notes.linguist_note: Free pratique is a health/port formality, not traffic, passage, or port clearance.
Port clearance request must not become pilot, berth, or cancellation.
Crew-list submission must not become passenger/cargo list or cancellation.
Customs requirement must not become immigration, complete, or not required.
Immigration inspection must not become customs, complete, or safety inspection.
Pilot boarding station must not become ladder, tug, or disembarkation station.
Pilot boarding time must not become departure, tug, or berth time.
Customs launch must not become pilot, tug, or fuel launch.
Clearance granted must not become not granted, pending, or pilot permission.
Negative clearance must not become granted, complete, or berth permission.
Quarantine berth must not become visitor/fuel berth or departure.
Inward clearance request must not become outward clearance, berth, or cancellation.

items.source_text: Передайте судовую роль экипажа в порт-контроль.
items.target_text: Submit crew list to Port Control.
accepted_answers: Submit crew list to Port Control.

should_accept: Submit crew list to Port Control.
should_reject: Submit passenger list to Port Control
Submit crew list to Marina Office
Cancel crew list to Port Control
qa_notes.linguist_note: Document type and authority must stay exact.

items.source_text: Таможенный катер подойдет к борту в 0900.
items.target_text: Customs launch alongside at zero nine zero zero.
accepted_answers: Customs launch alongside at zero nine zero zero.

should_accept: Customs launch alongside at zero nine zero zero.
should_reject: Pilot launch alongside at zero nine zero zero
Customs launch alongside at one zero zero zero
Customs launch departing at zero nine zero zero
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Launch type, time, and alongside/departing state
qa_notes.linguist_note: Launch type, time, and alongside/departing state must stay exact.

items.source_text: Иммиграционный офицер поднимается на борт у сервисного понтона.
items.target_text: Immigration officer boarding at service pontoon.
accepted_answers: Immigration officer boarding at service pontoon.

should_accept: Immigration officer boarding at service pontoon.
should_reject: Customs officer boarding at service pontoon
Immigration officer boarding at fuel berth
Immigration officer leaving at service pontoon
qa_notes.linguist_note: Officer type, action, and location must stay exact.

items.source_text: Оформление разрешено, следуйте к гостевому причалу.
items.target_text: Clearance granted, proceed to visitor berth.
accepted_answers: Clearance granted, proceed to visitor berth.

should_accept: Clearance granted, proceed to visitor berth.
should_reject: Clearance not granted proceed to visitor berth
Clearance granted proceed to fuel berth
Pilot granted proceed to visitor berth
qa_notes.linguist_note: Clearance polarity and berth type must stay exact.

items.source_text: Оформление не разрешено, ожидайте за пределами порта.
items.target_text: Clearance not granted, wait outside port limits.
accepted_answers: Clearance not granted, wait outside port limits.

should_accept: Clearance not granted, wait outside port limits.
should_reject: Clearance granted wait outside port limits
Clearance not granted enter port limits
Clearance not granted wait inside port limits
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Clearance polarity and inside/outside port-limits boundary
qa_notes.linguist_note: Clearance polarity and inside/outside port-limits boundary must stay exact.
Crew/passenger and remain/go-ashore boundaries must stay exact.

items.source_text: Никому не сходить на берег до оформления.
items.target_text: No persons go ashore before clearance.
accepted_answers: No persons go ashore before clearance.

should_accept: No persons go ashore before clearance.
should_reject: Persons may go ashore before clearance
No crew go ashore after clearance
No persons come aboard before clearance
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Shore-leave prohibition and before/after clearance boundary
qa_notes.linguist_note: Shore-leave prohibition and before/after clearance boundary must stay exact.
Outward clearance must not become inward clearance, departure-only, or cancellation.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Clearance documents readiness and document type
qa_notes.linguist_note: Clearance documents readiness and document type must stay exact.
Station name and boarding/tug/disembarkation boundaries must stay exact.

items.target_text: Pilot boarding at zero nine three zero.
accepted_answers: Pilot boarding at zero nine three zero.

should_accept: Pilot boarding at zero nine three zero.
should_reject: Pilot boarding at one zero three zero
Pilot leaving at zero nine three zero
Tug boarding at zero nine three zero
qa_notes.linguist_note: Time, action, and pilot/tug boundary must stay exact.

items.target_text: Pilot boarding delayed until one zero zero zero.
accepted_answers: Pilot boarding delayed until one zero zero zero.

should_accept: Pilot boarding delayed until one zero zero zero.
should_reject: Pilot boarding cancelled until one zero zero zero
Pilot boarding delayed until zero nine zero zero
Tug boarding delayed until one zero zero zero
qa_notes.linguist_note: Delay/cancel, time, and pilot/tug boundaries must stay exact.

items.source_text: Подтвердите: буксир для входа не требуется.
items.target_text: Confirm tug not required for port entry.
accepted_answers: Confirm tug not required for port entry.

should_accept: Confirm tug not required for port entry.
should_reject: Confirm tug required for port entry
Confirm pilot not required for port entry
Confirm tug not required for departure
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Tug requirement, pilot boundary, and entry/departure boundary
qa_notes.linguist_note: Tug requirement, pilot boundary, and entry/departure boundary must stay exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Service type and after/before clearance boundary
qa_notes.linguist_note: Service type and after/before clearance boundary must stay exact.
Bunkering, customs/immigration, and before/after boundary must stay exact.
Water/fuel and customs/immigration before/after boundaries must stay exact.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: Service type and immigration/customs before/after boundary
qa_notes.linguist_note: Service type and immigration/customs before/after boundary must stay exact.

items.source_text: Ожидайте в зоне ожидания до оформления.
items.target_text: Hold in waiting area until clearance.
accepted_answers: Hold in waiting area until clearance.

should_accept: Hold in waiting area until clearance.
should_reject: Hold in waiting area after clearance
dangerous_minimal_pairs: Holding location and until/after clearance boundary
qa_notes.linguist_note: Holding location and until/after clearance boundary must stay exact.

items.source_text: Войти в порт после разрешения оформления.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Entry/departure and clearance timing must stay exact.

items.source_text: Не входите в порт до оформления.
items.target_text: Do not enter port before clearance.
accepted_answers: Do not enter port before clearance.

should_accept: Do not enter port before clearance.
should_reject: Do not leave port before clearance
Do not enter berth before clearance
qa_notes.linguist_note: Prohibition, entry/departure, and port/berth boundary must stay exact.

items.source_text: Таможенное оформление завершено, выходное разрешение ожидается.
items.target_text: Customs clearance complete, departure clearance pending.
accepted_answers: Customs clearance complete, departure clearance pending.

should_accept: Customs clearance complete, departure clearance pending.
should_reject: Customs clearance pending departure clearance complete
Immigration clearance complete departure clearance pending
Customs clearance complete departure clearance granted
qa_notes.linguist_note: Customs/immigration and complete/pending/granted boundaries must stay exact.

items.source_text: Повторяю: ожидать таможенный катер на канале 12.
items.target_text: Read back, wait for customs launch on channel one two.
accepted_answers: Read back, wait for customs launch on channel one two.

should_accept: Read back, wait for customs launch on channel one two.
should_reject: Read back wait for pilot launch on channel one two
Read back wait for customs launch on channel one three
Read back proceed for customs launch on channel one two

qa_notes.linguist_note: Readback launch type, channel, and wait/proceed boundary must stay exact.
